name: Hilton Grand Vacations Inc.
summary: Hilton Grand Vacations Inc. (HGV) is a vacation ownership company operating under the Hilton brand. The company develops, markets, sells, and manages vacation ownership resorts and related products and services. HGV also provides financing to customers purchasing vacation ownership interests and manages a points-based exchange and rental program for its members.

products.name: Vacation Ownership Interests
products.description: Timeshare and vacation ownership products sold to consumers at HGV resort properties.

products.name: Vacation Club Membership
products.description: Points-based membership program allowing members to exchange and use vacation ownership interests.

products.name: Owner Financing
products.description: Consumer financing provided to purchasers of vacation ownership interests.

products.name: Resort Management Services
products.description: Management and operation of vacation ownership resort properties on behalf of owners associations.

partnerships.description: HGV operates under the Hilton brand pursuant to a licensing arrangement.
